name: changelog
author: sgcarstrends
description: Understand auto-generated changelogs via semantic-release. Use when viewing release history, understanding changelog format, or debugging missing changelog entries.
description_zh: 该技能使用 semantic-release 和约定式提交自动生成和维护 CHANGELOG.md 文件，确保版本历史一致，突出重大变更，并基于 Keep a Changelog 格式生成发布说明。
_original_description: This skill automatically generates and maintains CHANGELOG.md files using semantic-release and conventional commits, ensuring consistent version history, highlighting breaking changes, and producing release notes based on the Keep a Changelog format.

name: chart-implementation
author: sgcarstrends
description: Create interactive charts for car registration and COE data visualization using Recharts. Use when adding new chart types, fixing chart bugs, or implementing data visualizations.
description_zh: 该技能用于创建和定制汽车注册及拥车证数据的交互式可视化图表，支持折线图、柱状图、面积图等常见类型，使用React图表库实现。
_original_description: This skill helps create and customize interactive data visualization charts for car registration and COE data, supporting common chart types like line, bar, and area charts using React charting libraries.

name: code-review
author: sgcarstrends
description: Perform automated code reviews checking for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and code quality. Use before creating PRs, when reviewing complex changes, checking for security issues, or identifying performance problems.
description_zh: 该技能执行自动化代码审查，用于识别安全漏洞、性能问题和代码质量问题，帮助开发人员在创建拉取请求前发现问题并维持高标准。
_original_description: This skill performs automated code reviews to identify security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and code quality problems, helping developers catch issues before pull requests and maintain high standards.

name: component-docs
author: sgcarstrends
description: Generate or update component documentation with usage examples, props tables, and Storybook stories. Use when documenting new components, creating usage examples, or setting up Storybook stories.
description_zh: 该技能为UI组件生成和更新全面的文档，包括使用示例、属性表格和Storybook故事，确保项目文档的一致性和可维护性。
_original_description: This skill generates and updates comprehensive component documentation including usage examples, props tables, and Storybook stories for UI components, ensuring consistent and maintainable documentation across the project.

name: component-naming
author: sgcarstrends
description: Enforce consistent React component naming conventions using domain + role patterns. Use when creating, reviewing, or refactoring components.
description_zh: 该技能通过使用领域+角色的命名模式，强制实施一致的React组件命名规范，确保组件目的明确、易于维护，同时避免有问题的后缀和基于布局的命名。
_original_description: This skill enforces consistent React component naming conventions using a domain + role pattern, ensuring components have clear purpose and maintainability while avoiding problematic suffixes and layout-based names.

name: component-tester
author: sgcarstrends
description: Run Vitest tests for a specific component with coverage. Use when making changes to React components to ensure tests pass and coverage is maintained.
description_zh: 在修改React组件时自动运行Vitest测试，确保测试通过且覆盖率达标（语句80%、分支75%、函数80%、行80%），以维护代码质量。
_original_description: Automatically runs Vitest tests for specific React components when modified, ensuring tests pass and coverage meets thresholds (80% statements, 75% branches, 80% functions, 80% lines) to maintain code quality.

name: conventional-commits
author: sgcarstrends
description: Format commit messages following project conventions with commitlint validation. Use when committing changes, writing PR descriptions, or preparing releases.
description_zh: 该技能根据语义化版本规范生成约定式提交信息，确保正确的版本控制和清晰的变更记录。它提供结构化格式、有效的作用域示例以及不同类型的提交模板，以维护一致的项目历史记录。
_original_description: This skill generates conventional commit messages following semantic versioning rules, ensuring proper version bumps and clear change tracking. It provides structured formats, valid scopes, and examples for different commit types to maintain consistent project history.

name: data-seeding
author: sgcarstrends
description: Create or update database seed scripts for development and testing environments. Use when setting up test data, initializing development databases, creating demo environments, resetting to known state, or generating realistic sample data.
description_zh: 该技能帮助创建和管理用于开发和测试的数据库种子脚本，便于设置测试数据、初始化演示环境以及将数据库重置到已知状态。
_original_description: This skill helps create and manage database seed scripts for development and testing, enabling easy setup of test data, initialization of demo environments, and resetting databases to a known state.

name: dependency-upgrade
author: sgcarstrends
description: Upgrade dependencies safely using pnpm catalog, checking for breaking changes, and testing upgrades. Use when updating packages, applying security patches, upgrading major versions, resolving dependency conflicts, or modernizing tech stack.
description_zh: 该技能用于安全升级 pnpm monorepo 中的依赖项，通过检查更新、审查破坏性变更、更新中央版本目录并进行测试，以确保兼容性和稳定性。
_original_description: This skill safely upgrades dependencies in a pnpm monorepo by checking for updates, reviewing breaking changes, updating the central catalog, and testing the upgrades to ensure compatibility and stability.

name: deployment-rollback
author: sgcarstrends
description: Rollback failed deployments, restore previous versions, and handle deployment emergencies. Use when deployments fail, critical bugs are discovered in production, performance degrades after deployment, or emergency recovery is needed.
description_zh: 提供SST部署的具体回滚流程，包含AWS Lambda、数据库迁移和Next.js的回滚命令。涵盖生产环境关键bug、数据库故障等实际场景，并包含基于健康检查的自动化回滚工作流。
_original_description: Provides concrete rollback procedures for SST deployments with specific commands for AWS Lambda, database migrations, and Next.js. Includes practical scenarios like critical bug fixes and database failures, plus automated rollback workflows with health checks.

name: design-language-system
author: sgcarstrends
description: Apply the professional Navy Blue colour scheme and design tokens. Use when styling components, charts, or ensuring colour consistency across the application.
description_zh: 该技能应用专业的海军蓝配色方案和设计令牌，确保SG Cars Trends项目中组件和数据可视化的样式一致性，并消除任意十六进制代码的使用。
_original_description: This skill applies a professional Navy Blue color scheme and design tokens for consistent styling across SG Cars Trends, ensuring brand compliance in components and data visualizations while eliminating arbitrary hex codes.

name: domain-management
author: sgcarstrends
description: Configure domain routing and DNS for sgcarstrends.com. Use when adding new services, updating domain patterns, or debugging DNS issues.
description_zh: 使用Cloudflare和AWS SST管理sgcarstrends.com的域名路由和DNS配置。提供添加子域名、配置SSL证书和调试DNS问题的具体步骤，包含Web应用和API的代码示例。
_original_description: Manages domain routing and DNS for sgcarstrends.com using Cloudflare and AWS SST. Provides concrete steps for adding subdomains, configuring SSL, and debugging DNS issues with specific code examples for web apps and APIs.

name: gemini-blog
author: sgcarstrends
description: Configure or debug LLM blog post generation using Vercel AI SDK and Google Gemini. Use when updating blog generation prompts, fixing AI integration issues, modifying content generation logic, or working with structured output schemas.
_original_description: Configure or debug LLM blog post generation using Vercel AI SDK and Google Gemini. Use when updating blog generation prompts, fixing AI integration issues, or modifying content generation logic.

name: logo-management
author: sgcarstrends
description: Manage car logo fetching, scraping, and Vercel Blob storage in the logos package. Use when adding new car brand logos, updating logo sources, debugging brand name normalization, managing Vercel Blob storage, or optimizing logo caching.
description_zh: 管理汽车品牌Logo资源，包含品牌名称标准化、Redis缓存和Vercel Blob存储集成。提供外部源爬取工具，支持Logo URL解析和回退机制。
_original_description: Manages car logo assets with brand name normalization, Redis caching, and Vercel Blob storage integration. Provides scraping utilities for external sources and handles logo URL resolution with fallback mechanisms.

name: readme-updates
author: sgcarstrends
description: Maintain README files with setup instructions, features, tech stack, and usage examples. Use when updating project documentation, adding new features, improving onboarding, or creating READMEs for new packages.
description_zh: 该技能自动创建和维护全面的 README 文件，确保整个单体仓库中关于设置说明、功能特性、技术栈和使用示例的文档一致性，以改善项目上手体验和文档清晰度。
_original_description: This skill automates the creation and maintenance of comprehensive README files, ensuring consistent documentation for setup instructions, features, tech stack, and usage examples across a monorepo to improve project onboarding and clarity.

name: release-management
author: sgcarstrends
description: Manage releases with semantic-release, version bumps, and changelog generation. Use when preparing releases, debugging release failures, or understanding version history.
description_zh: 该技能使用 semantic-release 自动化软件发布流程，基于约定式提交管理版本、生成变更日志、创建 Git 标签并发布包，从而简化整个发布工作流。
_original_description: This skill automates software releases using semantic-release to manage versioning, generate changelogs, create Git tags, and publish packages based on conventional commits, streamlining the entire release workflow.

name: shadcn-components
author: sgcarstrends
description: Add or customize shadcn/ui components in the shared UI package. Use when adding new components from shadcn registry, updating existing component variants, customizing styling with Tailwind, or debugging shadcn/ui component issues.
description_zh: 该技能用于在共享 UI 包中添加和自定义 shadcn/ui 组件，支持发现、安装和配置基于 Radix UI 与 Tailwind CSS 构建的可复用 React 组件。
_original_description: This skill helps add and customize shadcn/ui components in a shared UI package, enabling discovery, installation, and configuration of reusable React components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.

name: tailwind-config
author: sgcarstrends
description: Update Tailwind CSS configuration, custom themes, and design tokens across packages. Use when adding new colors, spacing scales, or customizing the design system.
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者在monorepo中管理Tailwind CSS配置，提供自定义颜色、排版、间距和动画的模板。包含扩展基础配置和处理CSS变量（支持暗色模式）的实际示例。
_original_description: This skill helps developers manage Tailwind CSS configurations across monorepos, providing templates for custom colors, typography, spacing, and animations. It includes practical examples for extending base configurations and handling CSS variables with dark mode support.

name: typography-spacing-enforcer
author: sgcarstrends
description: Enforce Typography system and modern spacing conventions. Use when implementing new UI components to ensure design consistency with project standards.
description_zh: 该技能扫描React组件代码，检查排版和间距是否符合设计系统规范。它能识别原生HTML标题标签、错误的间距工具类，并提供具体的修复建议和文件位置。适用于组件开发和代码审查时保持UI一致性。
_original_description: This skill scans React component code for typography and spacing violations against a design system. It identifies raw HTML headings, incorrect spacing utilities, and provides specific fix suggestions with file references. It helps maintain UI consistency during component development and code reviews.

name: ui-design-system
author: sgcarstrends
description: Enforce modern dashboard UI patterns with pill-shaped design, professional colour scheme, and typography standards. Use when building or reviewing UI components for the web application.
description_zh: 该技能为SG汽车趋势网络应用程序强制执行一致的UI设计模式，采用现代仪表板美学，包括药丸形元素、专业的汽车配色方案和标准化的排版组件。
_original_description: This skill enforces consistent UI design patterns for the SG Cars Trends web application, implementing modern dashboard aesthetics with pill-shaped elements, professional automotive color schemes, and standardized typography components.

name: workflow-management
author: sgcarstrends
description: Create, debug, or modify Vercel WDK workflows for data updates and social media posting in the web application. Use when adding new automated jobs, fixing workflow errors, or updating scheduling logic.
description_zh: 该技能用于管理QStash工作流，实现自动化数据更新和社交媒体发布，支持创建、调试和修改定时任务，确保正确的错误处理和部署流程。
_original_description: This skill manages QStash workflows for automated data updates and social media posting, enabling creation, debugging, and modification of scheduled jobs while ensuring proper error handling and deployment.

name: agent-orchestration
author: shahtuyakov
description: Hub orchestration patterns for multi-agent workflows. Use when processing delegation requests from agents, coordinating sequential/parallel agent execution, and aggregating results. Provides the protocol for agent-to-agent communication through the hub.

name: api-design-reviewer
author: shahtuyakov
description: Expert API design reviewer for REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs. Analyzes API designs for security, performance, consistency, scalability, and maintainability. Use when designing new APIs, reviewing API proposals, auditing existing endpoints, or before major API releases. Covers authentication, error handling, pagination, versioning, rate limiting, idempotency, documentation, and production readiness.

name: database-patterns
author: shahtuyakov
description: Database design and implementation patterns for modern applications. Use when designing schemas, writing migrations, optimizing queries, and configuring ORMs. Covers PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Prisma, Drizzle, indexing strategies, and security best practices.

name: design-patterns
author: shahtuyakov
description: Modern design system patterns for 2025. Covers design tokens, OKLCH color systems, fluid typography, animations, dark mode, shadcn/ui components, and Figma handoff. Use when implementing UI styles, theming, accessibility, and visual polish.

name: devops-patterns
author: shahtuyakov
description: DevOps patterns for infrastructure, CI/CD, and deployment automation. Use when configuring Docker containers, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, Kubernetes, and monitoring. Covers GitHub Actions, Docker, Vercel, Railway, AWS, Terraform, and observability.

name: node-backend
author: shahtuyakov
description: Node.js backend development patterns for Express, NestJS, Fastify, and Hono. Use when implementing APIs, authentication, middleware, services, and server-side logic with Node.js and TypeScript. Provides project structure, code patterns, and best practices.

name: react-patterns
author: shahtuyakov
description: React and Next.js development patterns for building modern web applications. Use when implementing components, pages, hooks, state management, data fetching, forms, and client-side authentication. Covers TypeScript, App Router, Server Components, and best practices.

name: swift-patterns
author: shahtuyakov
description: Swift and SwiftUI development patterns for building native iOS/iPadOS applications. Use when implementing views, view models, data persistence, networking, concurrency, and navigation. Covers Swift 6.2, SwiftUI, SwiftData, iOS 26 features including Liquid Glass and Foundation Models.

name: system-design
author: shahtuyakov
description: System design patterns and architectural decision frameworks for web applications and iOS native apps. Use when making technology choices, selecting architecture patterns, designing APIs, choosing databases, planning authentication, or architecting mobile app backends. Provides comparison matrices for informed decision-making.

name: task-breakdown
author: shahtuyakov
description: Break down complex development requests into discrete, actionable tasks. Use when analyzing new features, integrations, refactoring requests, or any multi-component work that needs to be sequenced across agents. Provides patterns for identifying components, dependencies, and complexity.

name: agent-builder
author: shareAI-lab
description:
Design and build AI agents for any domain. Use when users:
(1) ask to "create an agent", "build an assistant", or "design an AI system"
(2) want to understand agent architecture, agentic patterns, or autonomous AI
(3) need help with capabilities, subagents, planning, or skill mechanisms
(4) ask about Claude Code, Cursor, or similar agent internals
(5) want to build agents for business, research, creative, or operational tasks
Keywords: agent, assistant, autonomous, workflow, tool use, multi-step, orchestration
description_zh: 一个AI智能体代码脚手架工具，提供从最小化到功能完整的代码模板，附带实用的智能体设计哲学和可直接运行的代码示例。
_original_description: A scaffolding tool that generates working AI agent code with templates ranging from minimal to full-featured. It provides practical philosophy on agent design with concrete code examples for immediate use.

name: code-review
author: shareAI-lab
description: Perform thorough code reviews with security, performance, and maintainability analysis. Use when user asks to review code, check for bugs, or audit a codebase.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的代码审查清单，涵盖安全性、正确性、性能和可维护性。包含Python和JavaScript中的具体漏洞示例，以及用于自动化扫描的命令行工具。输出格式将发现的问题组织为关键问题、改进建议和优点说明。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured checklist for reviewing code across security, correctness, performance, and maintainability. It includes specific examples of vulnerabilities in Python and JavaScript, along with command-line tools for automated scanning. The output format organizes findings into critical issues, improvements, and positive notes.

_original_description: Firebase gives you a complete backend in minutes - auth, database, storage, functions, hosting. But the ease of setup hides real complexity.
